title: How to export Pulse e-mail address to Excel / CSV
excerpt:
Hello, please can you tell me how to include the Pulse e-mail address in an export of data from Monday.com Workflow Management in Excel / CSV format? 
Or alternatively, how to add a new column on the Monday board showing…

posts.author: PaulaLightfoot (Paula)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, please can you tell me how to include the Pulse e-mail address in an export of data from Monday.com Workflow Management in Excel / CSV format?
Or alternatively, how to add a new column on the Monday board showing the Pulse e-mail for each entry so it is automatically included in exports?
Currently the Pulse e-mail is ‘hidden’ behind the primary contact e-mail so the exported data for that column only shows the primary contact e-mail.
Many thanks for any advice!
